description: S44C - Projects Feature Frontend: Create ProjectModel, ProjectService, project screens (project_screen, create_project_sheet), update sidebar_widget with Projects section, and add routes to router.dart
steps: Create frontend/lib/data/models/project_model.dart with ProjectModel class: fields id (String), userId (String), name (String), color (String), systemPrompt (String), createdAt (DateTime), updatedAt (DateTime). Include fromJson factory (manual, not generated - to avoid build_runner issues), toJson method, and copyWith. Follow the pattern of chat_model.dart but do NOT use json_annotation/code generation since we cannot run build_runner.

Create frontend/lib/data/services/project_service.dart extending ApiService with methods: getProjects() -> Future<List<ProjectModel>> via GET /projects, createProject(name, color, systemPrompt) -> Future<ProjectModel> via POST /projects, updateProject(id, data) -> Future<void> via PATCH /projects/{id}, deleteProject(id) -> Future<void> via DELETE /projects/{id}, getProjectChats(id) -> Future<List<ChatModel>> via GET /projects/{id}/chats. Follow the pattern in chat_service.dart with proper error handling (try/catch DioException rethrow).

Create frontend/lib/presentation/screens/projects/project_screen.dart: ConsumerStatefulWidget. AppBar with project name + color dot + edit icon. Body: list of chats in project (same style as chat list). Empty state: PenguinMascot + 'No chats yet' text. FAB: new chat in this project (Persian Orange, penguin icon). Follow existing screen patterns (isDark theming, GoogleFonts.dmSans, AppColors).

Create frontend/lib/presentation/screens/projects/create_project_sheet.dart: Bottom sheet widget. Title 'New Project' in DM Serif Display 18px. Name field with label 'Project name', hint 'Work, Study, Creative...', DM Sans 15px. Color picker row with 6 dots (#CC5801, #3B82F6, #10B981, #8B5CF6, #F59E0B, #EF4444), selected shows checkmark, default persian orange. System prompt field multiline max 4 lines. Gap 24px. Primary button 'Create Project' in Persian Orange. On tap: call createProject then pop.

Update frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/sidebar/sidebar_widget.dart: Above the chat list section, add a Projects section. Show only if Pro plan (for now use a placeholder bool). Header row: 'PROJECTS' text (DM Sans 11px weight 600 uppercase letterSpacing 1.2 textMuted), Spacer, IconButton Icons.add_outlined 16px (on tap: show create_project_sheet). Project items (max 5): Row with 8x8 circle color dot, gap 8px, project name (DM Sans 14px), Spacer, chat count (DM Sans 11px textMuted). On tap: navigate to project_screen. If > 5 projects: 'See all' link (DM Sans 12px persian, navigate to projects list).

Update frontend/lib/core/utils/router.dart: Add routes for /projects (ProjectListScreen - simple placeholder list), /projects/:id (ProjectScreen), /projects/:id/new-chat (ChatScreen with project_id param). Add AppRoutes constants. Import new screens.
acceptance_criteria: frontend/lib/data/models/project_model.dart exists with all fields, fromJson, toJson, copyWith
frontend/lib/data/services/project_service.dart exists with all 5 API methods extending ApiService
sidebar_widget.dart has Projects section above chat list
flutter analyze passes with no errors on all new/modified files
verification: Run: cd frontend && flutter pub get && flutter analyze --no-fatal-infos
